title: Bed Is Never Too Far Away
description: Stop beds from shouting "too far away".
body:
# Intro

A fork of Natte's [Bed Is Not Too Far Away](https://modrinth.com/mod/bed-is-not-too-far-away), compatible with Forge and NeoForge.

It disables the annoying popup 'You may not rest now; the bed is too far away' and instead lets you sleep.

# Licenses

Bed Is Not Too Far Away is licensed under the MIT license.

Bed Is Never Too Far Away is licensed under the MIT license.
